agent_summaries.role_description: Analyzes internal warehouse capacity, sales velocity, and available capital.
agent_summaries.findings_summary: Identified high sales velocity for SKU-112 (Heavyweight Zip Hoodies) which is depleting stock faster than expected. Confirmed 850 m³ of warehouse space available, primarily in Section C. Flagged SKU-044 (Neon Windbreaker) as dead stock consuming 22 m³.

agent_summaries.role_description: Monitors TikTok, Instagram, and fashion blogs for emerging macro-trends.
agent_summaries.findings_summary: Detected a massive 310% surge in TikTok mentions for 'Utility Cargo Pants' over the last 48 hours, driven by a viral styling video. The trend is expanding rapidly into mainstream European markets. Neon colors have plummeted in sentiment.

agent_summaries.role_description: Scrapes competitor websites to identify stockouts and pricing opportunities.
agent_summaries.findings_summary: Found that major competitor 'Z-Retail' is completely out of stock on Olive Cargo Pants in 80% of local sizes. Pricing analysis suggests a high margin opportunity if we can procure and list within 5 days before they restock.

recommendations.name: Olive Utility Cargo Pants
recommendations.reasoning: TikTok mentions up 310%. Competitor 'Z-Retail' is 80% out-of-stock locally.

recommendations.name: Heavyweight Zip Hoodie (Charcoal)
recommendations.reasoning: Consistent 15% MoM growth in internal ERP data. High margin.

recommendations.name: Neon Windbreaker
recommendations.reasoning: Search volume dropped 60%. Currently occupying 22m³ of warehouse space. Apply 20% discount.
